title: Macaroni over Carrots
description: Replaces your boring Carrots with MACARONI!
body:
I did it again! Made a silly little texture pack that replaces Carrots (Planted Carrots, Carrot, Golden Carrot and Carrot on a stick) WITH MACARONI. Munch on some macaroni while you're out adventuring!

Why download it? Because everyone loves Macaroni right? I at least hope so.

I did however forget to change the ingame description of the resource pack to 1.20+ but its made for 1.20+ I promise!
